resources.string: Do this for all remaining conflicts
"Arcile respects your privacy. It is an offline-first file manager and does not collect or share your personal data with any third-party services."
"See what's new in the latest version."
"Found a bug? Let me know on GitHub."
"This application is built with the following open source libraries. Each library is the property of its respective owner and is used under the terms of its license."
"Classify external volumes as SD card, OTG, or reset them."
Restart Arcile and show the setup flow again.
Arcile will reset the setup flow. Restart the app to begin onboarding again.
Display image and video thumbnails instead of file icons.
Blend category and status colors with the active theme accent color.
Enable haptic feedback on actions and gestures.
Display filenames on up to two lines.
"Temporary external storage is mounted but excluded from indexed dashboard insights."
"We couldn't find any indexed storage volumes to analyze."

"This storage is treated as temporary, so dashboard insights are unavailable. Temporary storage stays browsable but is excluded from indexed categories, recents, search, and dashboard totals until it is classified as an SD card."
Temporary storage stays browsable, but folder usage mapping is available only for indexed internal storage and SD cards.
Try refreshing, or open the folder in the browser.
Some folders could not be read, so this total may be partial.
Scan is still running, so this total may change.
This application requires permission to read and manage files on your device.
No files from this folder match the current view.
Files you open recently will appear here for quick access.
We couldn\'t find anything matching \"%1$s\". Try a different keyword or filters.
There is no content available for this view.
This folder doesn\'t have any files yet. You can create one using the + button.
Browsing temporary USB storage. It is excluded from indexed surfaces and deletions are permanent.
Browsing unclassified external storage. It is treated as temporary until classified, and deletions are permanent.
Selected items will be moved to the Trash Bin. You can restore them later.
Selected items will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

Your selection includes items from both permanent storage (which uses the Trash Bin) and temporary storage (which deletes items permanently).\n\nTo prevent accidental data loss, please delete items from these storages separately.
Keep this layout for nested folders too
This archive does not contain any files or folders.
Enter the password to open this archive.
Leave off for normal archives; enable only if this archive is encrypted.
Create separate archive for each item
%1$s was interrupted at %2$s. Some files may already have changed.
Selected file is not a supported archive
Invalid name: must not be blank or contain /, \\, or ..
A file or folder with this name already exists
Storage for this path is not available
Home data loading timed out. Showing previous complete analytics where available.
Arcile does not have permission to change those files.
That storage location is not available.
A file or folder with that name already exists.
There is not enough free space to finish this operation.
This storage provider does not support that action.
Some files were changed before the operation stopped.
Trash metadata is damaged or incomplete.
Arcile blocked this action because the path is unsafe.
Check storage permissions and try again.
Reconnect the storage device, then refresh.
Choose a different name or resolve the conflict.
Free up space, then try again.
Use permanent delete for this storage.
Review the affected files before trying again.
Choose a destination folder to recover the files.
Choose a folder inside an available storage volume.
Try again. If it keeps failing, refresh the folder.
All items in the trash will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
When you delete files from permanent storage, they\'ll stay here for 30 days before being deleted forever.
There are no indexed volumes available to restore the files to. Please check your storage management settings.
The original storage volume is unavailable. Where would you like to restore the file(s)?
Some folders could not be scanned. Results may be incomplete.
Files over 100 MB sorted by size.
Files with the same name and size.
Installer packages that may no longer be needed.
Large video files from indexed storage.
Temporary, log, backup, and cache-like files.
%1$d selected file(s) will be moved to Arcile Trash. You can restore them later.
I reviewed these high-risk files and still want to move them to Trash.
Selected items will be moved to the Trash Bin. You can restore them later.
Selected items will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
Android will show the final system confirmation before deleting these items.
This selection combines reversible trash and permanent delete destinations. Delete these groups separately to avoid accidental data loss.
Irreversible: files cannot be restored from Arcile Trash.
Items deleted from internal storage or SD cards are moved here. They are stored locally on each volume in a hidden .arcile folder.
External storage defaults to temporary until you classify it.
SD card volumes are indexed and use trash. OTG and unclassified volumes stay browsable only and deletions are permanent.
No mounted storage volumes found on this device.
Permanent device storage. Indexed and trash-enabled.
Permanent external storage. Indexed and trash-enabled.
Temporary USB storage. Browsable only and deletions are permanent.
Temporary until classified. Browsable only and deletions are permanent.
User classification saved for this volume.
Opens in the Android Files app due to platform restrictions.
Are you sure you want to remove %1$s from Quick Access?
Apply to this folder and subfolders
A focused file manager for browsing storage, reviewing recent files, and keeping everyday file work under control.
An advanced, powerful, fast, and smooth Android file manager built with Kotlin and Material Design 3.
Seamlessly manage Internal Storage, SD Cards, and USB OTG devices
Multi-select files for copy, cut, move, or permanent delete
Jump into images, videos, audio, documents, archives, and APKs
Safely remove files with metadata-aware restoration
Arcile is a personal project built with a privacy-first mindset.
Arcile does not declare the INTERNET permission, your files and activity data cannot leave your device.
The application contains zero advertisements and zero third-party tracking SDKs.
All file operations are executed locally on your device; no data is transmitted externally.
Arcile\'s source code is publicly available for inspection on GitHub.
Arcile keeps the common paths close while still respecting Android storage limits.
Open internal storage, SD cards, OTG drives, folders, archives, and recent files from one place.
Jump into images, videos, audio, documents, archives, and APKs without hunting through folders.
Supported permanent storage can use Arcile trash so accidental deletes are easier to recover.
Android/data and Android/obb open through the system Files app when Android blocks direct access.
Pick a theme and accent now, or leave the defaults and change them later in Settings.
Arcile needs all-files access to list, copy, move, rename, archive, and delete files across shared storage.
Arcile can now open your shared storage and prepare the browser.
Arcile can read and write user-visible files on internal storage, SD cards, and supported USB drives.
Android still blocks other apps\' private Android/data folders and other restricted areas.
Android will open Settings to grant this permission, then Arcile checks it when you return.
Notifications help show progress for long copy, move, delete, and archive work while Arcile keeps running.
Arcile can show progress for long-running file operations.
This Android version does not require a separate notification permission.
Some file-management features may be limited on older Android versions. Arcile will show the best supported path for this device.
Arcile is set up and ready to browse your files.
Arcile needs all-files access before it can browse and manage files. Re-enable access in Android Settings to continue.
Your files stay on this device. Arcile uses this permission only for file manager actions you start.
Could not open folder in Files app
Overwrite files with zeroes before deleting them
Primary and Background colors are too similar! Readability issues may occur.
